name: Curried Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds beef round steak or lean stewing beef, cut into 1 1/2-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6 to 8
Wipe the beef well clean.
Mix flour and curry powder together. Coat the meat cubes with this mixture.
Place the meat in a Crock-Pot.
Add garlic, raisins, sliced apples, diced onion, salt, and pepper.
Pour in broth and stir to blend everything.
Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours, until the meat is tender.
Before serving, stir in additional curry powder to taste (up to 1 tablespoon) and chopped apples. Serve over hot, fluffy rice.
Variation: 3 pounds cubed lean lamb may be substituted for the beef.
